docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174) AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 JONES STREET #1001, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 76600455) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $110.00. (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF UD-120. (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC SERVED JUN-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76660174), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC SERVED JUN-09-2025, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76754551)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEPHONE
